sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_REDIRECTBOARDID#
SELECT BOARDID, TABUSED, VIEWORDER FROM TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #tabUsed#, VIEWORDER = #viewOrder# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = 'everyone'

select.isEqual: SELECT BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (USERID = #v_USERID# OR USERID = 'everyone') ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.BOARDNAME , A.BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED , B.GUBUN FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( USERID = #v_USERID# OR USERID = 'everyone' ) AND TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#

select.isEqual: SELECT BOARDNAME FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDGROUPID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN (BOARDNAME2 = '' OR BOARDNAME2 IS NULL) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE BOARDNAME2 END FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDGROUPID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT NAME1 AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NAME1, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_PSTRLANG$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT NAME1 AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NAME1, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_PSTRLANG$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , MAIN_FLAG FLAG , IMAGENAME FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , IMAGENAME , MAIN_FLAG FLAG FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.ITEMID , A.STARTDATE , A.ENDDATE , A.TITLE , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.IMPORTANCE , B.BOARDID , B.BOARDNAME , B.BOARDNAME2 , A.ABSTRACT , A.DOCNO FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WriterID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.StartDate > #nowDate# ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate ASC LIMIT #v_PENDROW#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.ITEMID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.IMPORTANCE, B.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME, B.BOARDNAME2, A.ABSTRACT, A.DocNo FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.STARTDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY #v_PSORTBY# LIMIT #v_PENDROW#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) AND A.StartDate < #nowDate# AND A.StartDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.EndDate > #nowDate# AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )

SELECT CASE WHEN LISTCOUNT IS NULL THEN 20 ELSE LISTCOUNT END LISTCOUNT, PREVIEW , PREVIEWWLIST , PREVIEWWCONTENT , PREVIEWHLIST , PREVIEWHCONTENT FROM TBL_Board_Configuration WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

isEmpty.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.TITLE TITLE , B.GUBUN , A.BOARDID BOARDID , B.BOARDNAME$lang$ BOARDNAME, A.WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, A.CONTENTLOCATION, C.MAIL FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writerid = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID#
isEmpty.isEmpty: SELECT BOARDID, CONTENTLOCATION FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

isNotEmpty.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.TITLE TITLE , B.GUBUN , A.BOARDID BOARDID , B.BOARDNAME$lang$ BOARDNAME, A.WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, A.CONTENTLOCATION FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID#
isNotEmpty.isEmpty: SELECT BOARDID, CONTENTLOCATION FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME$lang$ AS USERNAME, USERDEPTNAME$lang$ AS USERDEPTNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME$lang$ AS USERCOMPANYNAME, USERTITLE$lang$ AS USERTITLE, READDATE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND BoardID = #boardID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND UserID NOT IN ( SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# ) ORDER BY ReadDate DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT ITEMID , BOARDID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , WRITERCOMPANYID , WRITERCOMPANYNAME , WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , UPDATEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , READCOUNT , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , DOCNO , DOCPASSWORD , MAINCONTENT , NOTINO , TOPWRITERID , APPRFLAG , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_PORGITEMID# AND BOARDID = #v_PORGBOARDID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE#, '%') AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_PREVIOUSITEMID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC, STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE#, '%') AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC, STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY))) ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.MAINCONTENT, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ITEMID ) as ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ITEMID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE , A.NOTINO , A.MAINCONTENT , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND APPRFLAG = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC
ORDER BY A.NotiNo ASC, A.ParentWriteDate DESC, A.WriteDate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

select.isEqual: SELECT A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE , B.BOARDNAME BOARDNAME , A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE , B.BOARDNAME BOARDNAME , A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate, A.WriteDate DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, A.APPRFLAG AS APPRFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST APPR ON A.BOARDID = APPR.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND A.APPRFLAG = 'N' AND APPR.APPRUSERID = #v_PUSERID# ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.APPRUSERID , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , B.DESCRIPTION , B.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_UserMaster B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.APPRUSERID = B.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.DOCNO, A.MAINCONTENT, B.FILEPATH, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y'
A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.DOCNO, A.MAINCONTENT, B.FILEPATH, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# $v_TEMP$ $v_PSUBQUERY$ ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY NOTINO DESC, A.ParentWriteDate ASC, A.WriteDate ASC

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2 FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID WHERE $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) $v_PSUBQUERY$ ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) $v_PSUBQUERY$ ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, I.BOARDNAME, I.BOARDNAME2, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) $v_PSUBQUERY$ ORDER BY $iv_PORDERBYSUB$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID#
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYNAME$lang$ WRITERCOMPANYNAME, WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3$lang$ EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , A.APPRFLAG , B.GUBUN , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.BOARDID , A.DOCNO FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYNAME$lang$ WRITERCOMPANYNAME, WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3$lang$ EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , DOCNO FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) AND A.StartDate < #nowDate# AND A.StartDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.EndDate > #nowDate# AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
SELECT DISTINCT B.BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #V_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
AND TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMFLAG = 'Y' AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ItemID) FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND UpperItemIDTree LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_pItemID#), '%') AND ItemID <> #v_pItemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND StartDate < #nowDate# AND EndDate > #nowDate#
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT DISTINCT B.BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y' AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ACCESSID) cnt FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND READ_FG = 'FALSE' AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# )
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) cnt FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND WRITERID = #v_ACCESSID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE $v_PWHEREBOARD$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# $v_PSUBQUERY$

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1'
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# $v_PSUBQUERY$
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# $v_PSUBQUERY$

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CONTENTLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #docID#
SELECT CONTENTLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #docID#
SELECT FORMLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #docID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT FILEPATH, FILENAME FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND GUID = #attID#
SELECT APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
SELECT BOARDNAME FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
SELECT LISTCOUNT , PREVIEW , PREVIEWWLIST , PREVIEWWCONTENT , PREVIEWHLIST , PREVIEWHCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_USERID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY GUID

SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate = #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND upperitemidtree LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE#, '%') AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY upperitemidtree, startdate DESC

SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY parentwritedate ASC, upperitemidtree , startdate ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree LIMIT 20

SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardId# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1'

SELECT COUNT(B.APPRUSERID) AS CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND background = 'Y'

SELECT REPLYID, $v_UserName$ AS USERNAME, USERID, CONTENT, WRITEDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BoardID# AND itemid = #v_ItemID# ORDER BY writedate ASC
SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND replyid = #v_ReplyID# AND userid = #v_UserID#

SELECT COUNT(B.APPRUSERID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT PARENTBOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
SELECT DOCPASSWORD FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemID = #itemID# AND replyID = #replyID#
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND writerid = #userID# AND startdate > #nowDate#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.appruserid = #id# AND B.apprflag = 'N' AND B.startdate <= #nowDate# AND B.enddate > #nowDate#

SELECT DISTINCT WRITERID, WRITERNAME$lang$ AS WRITERNAME, TUM.MAIL FROM TBL_Board_Item TBI INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER TUM ON TBI.TENANT_ID = TUM.TENANT_ID AND TBI.WRITERID = TUM.CN WHERE TBI.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardID = #boardID# AND ItemID like CONCAT(#itemTreeID#, '%')

SELECT A.APPRUSERID AS ID, B.MAIL AS EMAIL, B.DisplayName$lang$ AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A INNER JOIN TBL_UserMaster B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.APPRUSERID = B.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BOARDID = #boardID#

select.isEqual: SELECT ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND boardadmin_fg = 'true' AND postnotice = 'true'
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME2 AS ACCESSNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND boardadmin_fg = 'true' AND postnotice = 'true'

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND itemid = #itemID#

SELECT APPRUSERID FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND A.APPRUSERID = #v_USERID#
SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Configuration WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
SELECT MAIN_FLAG FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND imageID = #v_IMAGEID# AND ItemID = #v_ITEMID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET VIEWORDER = #count# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND ( USERID = #userID# OR USERID = 'everyone' )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND USERID = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET VIEWORDER = ( SELECT VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}' ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET LISTCOUNT = #listCount#, PREVIEW = #preview#, PREVIEWWLIST = #previewWList#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #previewWContent#, PREVIEWHLIST = #previewHList#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #previewHContent# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWWLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWHLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET NOTINO = #sn# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET main_Flag = CASE WHEN imageID = #v_IMAGEID# THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET ListCount = #v_LISTCOUNT#, PreView = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET COPIEDITEM = 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #destItemID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'C' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

update.isNotEmpty: UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FilePath = #v_FilePath#, FileContent = #v_FileContent#, ImageName = #v_OFileName#, WriteDate = #nowDate# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#
update.isEmpty: UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FileContent = #v_FileContent# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#, StartDate = #startDate#, EndDate = #endDate#, Abstract = #ABSTRACT#, Attachments = #hasAttach#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassword#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = 0 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND apprFlag = 'C' AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET copieditem = 1 WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #destItemID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND IMAGEID = #v_pIMAGEID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID , A.STARTDATE , A.TITLE , A.ABSTRACT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC, A.STARTDATE DESC ) as TEMP LIMIT #v_PMAXCOUNT#

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT,ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
